payload.message:
Noon medication reminder for Dave.

Reply with ONE short, warm sentence (1 line, ~12-20 words) reminding him to take his noon meds. Add a small quip — HAL/2001 references land well, dry humor, gentle nudges. Vary it day to day.

Do not call any tools. Your reply is delivered verbatim to Dave's iMessage by the cron worker — no preamble, no explanation, no status line. Just the sentence.

Evening wind-down check-in for Dave at 9 PM.

Reply with a brief, warm but direct check-in (1-3 short sentences) asking what his plan is for the night. Anchor on the goals: book by 10 PM, lights out by 10:45 PM. No nagging tone — accountability, not pressure. Vary the phrasing day to day.

Do not call any tools. Your reply is delivered verbatim to Dave's iMessage by the cron worker — no preamble, no explanation, no status. Just the message itself. Sound like Bishop, not a notification.

3pm medication reminder for Dave.

Reply with ONE short, warm sentence (1 line, ~12-20 words) reminding him to take his 3pm meds. Add a small quip — HAL/2001 references land well, dry humor, gentle nudges. Vary it day to day.

Do not call any tools. Your reply is delivered verbatim to Dave's iMessage by the cron worker — no preamble, no explanation, no status line. Just the sentence.

Search for a used red Honda Fit EX-L with under 60k miles for sale. Search these 4 sites using web_search tool: Carvana, Carfax, Carmax, and CarGurus. Use queries like "red Honda Fit EX-L under 60000 miles site:carvana.com", repeat for each site.

Cache file: /Users/bishop/.openclaw/workspace/memory/car-search-seen.txt
This file contains URLs of listings already seen (one per line). Create it if missing.

Steps:
1. Run web_search for each of the 4 sites
2. Collect all result URLs from the search results
3. Read the cache file (if exists)
4. Find any URLs not already in the cache
5. If new URLs found: call sessions_send with sessionKey="main" and message listing each new result (title, URL). Note in message if the trim level looks uncertain (e.g. might be EX not EX-L) so Dave can check.
6. Append all new URLs to the cache file
7. If no new URLs: do nothing, exit silently.

Keep sessions_send message short. Format: "🚗 New Honda Fit listing(s):\n- [title] — [url]\n..." One entry per listing.

Paddle-board forecast check for Dave at 5 AM PT.

Call the exec tool exactly once with this command:

python3 /Users/bishop/.openclaw/workspace/skills/paddle-board-alert/scripts/check.py --real-send

That is your only job. Do not narrate. Do not summarize. Do not call any other tools. The Python script handles fetching the forecast, evaluating the wind window, and (on a go-day) delivering the iMessage to Dave directly via BlueBubbles. After exec returns, reply with the single word OK. Nothing else.

Weekly YNAB transaction categorizer for Dave on Sunday at 9 AM PT.

Call the exec tool exactly once with this command:

python3 /Users/bishop/.openclaw/workspace/skills/ynab-categorize/scripts/propose.py --no-apply

That is your only job. Do not narrate. Do not summarize. Do not call any other tools. The Python script handles fetching uncategorized transactions, classification, and delivery (email + iMessage). After exec returns, reply with the single word OK. Nothing else.
